package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gin_route_paths_repeated_as_raw_strings: Repeated route path literals that should be centralized or grouped more intentionally.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule054NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule054NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule054NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario054Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule054NegativeService, input Rule054NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
